block.caption: FIGURE 1.15 One representation of the boundary surfaces of the d orbitals. Four of the orbitals have two perpendicular nodal planes that intersect in a line passing through the nucleus. In the dz2 orbital, the nodal surface forms two cones that meet at the nucleus.

overrides.reason: MinerU 整塊漏抓 fig-1.15（d 軌域 boundary surfaces）+ fig-1.16，catalog 序列從 1.14 直跳 1.17。raw PDF p.38 上欄確有此圖；ch01 body[149] 原文『Figs 1.15 and 1.16』、ch23 引用 Figure 1.16。情境(B) 真缺→pdf_crop。

block.caption: FIGURE 1.16 One representation of the boundary surfaces of the f orbitals. Other representations (with different shapes) are also sometimes encountered.

overrides.reason: MinerU 漏抓 fig-1.16（f 軌域 boundary surfaces），ch23 body[15] 引用 Figure 1.16 觸發 C4。raw PDF p.38 下欄確有此圖。selector body[152] 為前一筆插入 fig-1.15 後的位置（引擎逐條 re-load）→ fig-1.16 落在 fig-1.15 之後。

block.caption: FIGURE B4.1 The layered structure of the Earth, whose solid iron inner core is proposed to adopt the body-centred cubic structure.

overrides.reason: MinerU 漏抓 fig-B4.1（Box 4.1『What happens to metals under pressure?』內 Earth 核心剖面+bcc 晶格圖）；ch04 body[136] 內文『...aligns along the Earth's axis of rotation (Fig. B4.1)』觸發 C4。catalog 已有 fig-B4.2..B4.5、缺 B4.1。raw PDF p.126 右欄確有此圖。CAPTION 為重建（非 verbatim）：raw 文字層此圖只剩裸『FIGURE B4.1』標籤、無描述句，重建內容忠於圖面（Earth 剖面 6378/1278 km + Inner core + bcc 晶格）與 Box 4.1 內文（鐵核心 bcc 多晶型）。
